claim: A deterministic fixture over the twenty-first-wave biology corpus reports HYPHAL_CONTEXT_FIXTURE_MATCH: the hyphal route recovers the same required evidence classes and guardrails as the full-context route with fewer estimated prompt tokens, but it does not prove universal route superiority or model answer quality.
scope: Project Telos twenty-second-wave prooflesson for receipt-first context routing benchmarks
decision_summary: The fixture is executable and receipt-backed. It shows token-estimate savings under equal required evidence-class and guardrail recovery for this frozen corpus only.
